Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Neveo Mosser and there being no appearance by Defendant Chris Mahoney the matter is ordered off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
